name: Pipedrive
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Pipedrive
metaTitle: Build AI Agents for Pipedrive with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Pipedrive to look up deals, update records, trigger workflows, and support teams with secure, bounded actions.
intro: Pipedrive helps revenue teams manage leads, deals, activities, and pipeline progress in one place. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe in plain language how you want an AI agent to use Pipedrive, and Skill Builder will design, secure, test, improve, and deploy that ability for customer support or internal team workflows. The result is an AI agent that can answer questions and take approved action in Pipedrive instead of only telling people what to do next.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent check Pipedrive deal or contact status during a chat and give the customer a clear progress update.
Use a support agent connected to your helpdesk to create or update a Pipedrive contact when a customer shares new company, phone, or account details.
Have the agent log important support-to-sales context in Pipedrive notes so account teams see renewal risks, expansion interest, or urgent follow-up needs.
Allow the agent to create a qualified lead or deal in Pipedrive when a website visitor asks for pricing, demos, or sales follow-up.
Enable the agent to summarize open activities, recent deal changes, and key account context from Pipedrive before handing a conversation to a human rep.
internalUseCases: Let employees chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or chat to look up Pipedrive contacts, deals, organizations, and recent activity without switching tools.
Give sales or customer success teams an internal agent that can create follow-up tasks, update deal stages, and add notes in Pipedrive through approved workflows.
Help revenue operations employees ask the agent for pipeline research, deal summaries, or missing CRM field checks across Pipedrive records.
Allow account managers to chat with the agent to prepare handoff summaries from support, onboarding, or renewal conversations and save them into Pipedrive.
Support internal SOPs by having the agent gather context from Pipedrive, ask for any missing details, and complete repeatable record-update workflows safely.
whatYouCanBuild: A support agent that looks up deal status and explains the latest pipeline activity to customers.
An AI assistant that creates Pipedrive leads from qualified website conversations with approval rules.
A private sales agent that updates deal stages and logs notes after team chats.
A customer success assistant that summarizes account history from contacts, deals, and activities.
An internal agent that checks CRM completeness and flags missing fields before handoff workflows.
A support-to-sales handoff Skill that creates notes, activities, and follow-up tasks in Pipedrive.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the Pipedrive agent to do in plain language, such as looking up deal status, creating leads, updating contacts, or preparing handoff summaries.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that goal into a reusable DocsBot Skill, defines the right workflow, identifies required configuration values, and sets up secure connection and authentication handling without exposing credentials in chats or Skill content.

howItWorks.title: Safety is built in
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder protects and proxies secrets through secure runtime configuration, scopes access to the minimum records and actions needed, and adds approval boundaries for sensitive updates or workflow triggers.

howItWorks.title: Scenarios are tested
howItWorks.description: An automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios against the Skill, finds bugs, weak instructions, missing safeguards, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated improvement loop.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once the Skill is improved and validated, Skill Builder helps deploy it to your customer-facing DocsBot widget, helpdesk agent, or private team assistant so it can answer questions and take bounded action in Pipedrive.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent for Pipedrive without writing integration code?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the outcome you want in plain language and Skill Builder designs the Pipedrive workflow for you. It handles secure configuration, authentication, testing, improvement, and deployment so your agent can safely look up or update CRM data.

faq.question: Can a DocsBot customer support agent use Pipedrive data during live chats or support tickets?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use a Pipedrive Skill to retrieve deal, contact, organization, or activity context while replying to customers. It can also prepare handoffs, create leads, or log approved notes when those actions fit your workflow rules.

faq.question: What Pipedrive workflows can an internal AI assistant automate for employees?
faq.answer: An internal DocsBot agent can help employees research accounts, summarize deals, create follow-up activities, update record fields, and complete repeatable CRM SOPs from chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams. You decide which actions are allowed and where approval is required.

faq.question: Can an AI agent update Pipedrive records safely?
faq.answer: Yes, DocsBot Skill Builder is designed to add scoped permissions, secure secret handling, and approval boundaries around record changes. That lets your agent perform bounded updates such as adding notes, creating tasks, or changing selected fields under customer-defined rules.

faq.question: Can DocsBot use Pipedrive for support-to-sales handoffs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can build a Skill that captures qualified interest, summarizes the conversation, and creates or updates the right Pipedrive lead, contact, deal, note, or activity. This helps sales teams receive cleaner handoffs with the context they need.

faq.question: How does setup work for a Pipedrive AI agent in DocsBot?
faq.answer: You explain the business outcome you want, and Skill Builder handles the design details behind the scenes. It determines the needed configuration values, secures authentication, tests scenarios, improves the Skill, and helps publish it to the right DocsBot agent.

brand.title: Pipedrive
brand.description: Pipedrive is a sales-focused customer relationship management (CRM) platform founded in 2010 that helps small businesses and revenue teams visualize pipelines, manage leads, and automate the entire sales process. Used by over 100,000 companies worldwide, the cloud‑based solution centralizes deal tracking, activity scheduling, and reporting in one intuitive interface, allowing teams to spend more time selling and less time on admin. Headquartered in New York with offices across Europe and the US, Pipedrive is backed by Vista Equity Partners and other leading investors, and continues to innovate tools that simplify and accelerate deal closing.
brand.slogan: Less time managing, more time closing deals.
